name: grovemd
description: Grove — a local markdown wiki for any folder. Browse, read, and (soon) edit. Renders GFM, math, mermaid, syntax highlighting, and media previews.
author: Moriz Mensi-Klarbach

scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npx ng build --configuration production
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:server
scripts.build:wiki: cd frontend && npx ng build --configuration wiki
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:wiki
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:frontend
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run check:sandbox && npm run build:all
